case_title: HENDRICKS, P.C., STEPHEN C vs. CORKLAND, ALVIN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS, P.C., STEPHEN C AS TO DEFENDANT CORKLAND, ALVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS, P.C., STEPHEN C SERVED MAY-31-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORKLAND, ALVIN
